title: Hashmaps 3
description: The Entry API provides powerful methods for updating HashMap values based on whether a key exists.
instructions: Use the entry API to build a scores HashMap from a list of game results.
hints: Use `.entry().or_insert_with()` to create a default Team if one doesn't exist.
For team_1: add team_1_score to goals_scored and team_2_score to goals_conceded.
The or_insert_with closure: || Team { goals_scored: 0, goals_conceded: 0 }
explanation: The Entry API's `.or_insert_with()` takes a closure that creates the default value only when needed (lazy initialization). This is more efficient than `.or_insert()` when the default value is expensive to create. The entry API returns a mutable reference, so you can directly modify the value after insertion.
